name: E6T1: end-to-end client booking flow (service → barber → date → time → name → phone → confirm)

payload.text:
Got it — Alex Smith.

Now send your phone number so we can confirm the booking. (e.g. 555-123-4567)

✅ Confirm your booking

Service: Haircut + Beard (45 min)
Barber: Any barber
Date: 2026-06-19
Time: 15:00
Name: Alex Smith
Phone: 555-987-6543

Tap confirm to lock it in, reschedule to pick a new time, or cancel.

🎉 Booked!

Haircut + Beard with Any barber
2026-06-19 at 15:00
Name: Alex Smith
Phone: 555-987-6543

We'll send a 2-hour reminder before your appointment. Tap /start any time to book again.

name: E6T1: /start menu navigates to every main flow (Book, Services, Contact)

payload.text:
💇 Our services

• Haircut — 30 min
• Beard trim — 15 min
• Haircut + Beard — 45 min
• Kids cut — 30 min
• Hot towel shave — 40 min

Tap Book appointment to schedule.

Mustafa's Cuts — help 💈

Here's what I can do right now:
/start — Open the main menu (Book, Services, Contact)
/help  — Show this help message

Tip: most things are easier from the menu — just tap /start.

name: E6T1: an unknown command falls through to the friendly hint (not silence)

payload.text: I don't recognise /whatever. Try /start to open the menu, or /help for what I can do.
